response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of broad full-stack and systems experience, staff-level titles across multiple organizations, and recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery, and his AI-specific work is confined to a single 6-month engagement. Critical gaps include no Python anywhere in the resume, no demonstrated RAG or vector database experience, and no evidence of LLM evaluation pipelines or optimization — all of which are core requirements for a Staff GenAI role.
strengths: Hands-on MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq directly maps to the role's Model Context Protocol and agentic workflow responsibilities
Staff-level track record across multiple organizations with demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with AWS CDK exposure and proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems at scale
concerns: Python is absent from the resume entirely — it is the dominant language for AI/ML engineering and an explicitly required technology in the job description
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or LLM performance optimization, which are central to the role
AI-specific experience is limited to one 6-month role; the position requires 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and RAG/vector DB skills
